name: Calais Elementary School
description: Calais Elementary School is a place to play pickleball in Calais, ME. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include lights.

name: Calais High School
description: Calais High School is a place to play pickleball in Calais, ME. There is 1 indoor wood court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is private.

name: Calais Rec. Department - Tennis/Pickleball Courts
description: Calais Rec. Department - Tennis/Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Calais, ME. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Eastport Elementary School
description: Eastport Elementary School is a place to play pickleball in Eastport, ME. There is 1 indoor acrylic court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court is free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and locker rooms.

name: Grand Lake Stream
description: Grand Lake Stream is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Grand Lake Stream, ME. There is 1 outdoor acrylic court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The court is free.

name: Lubec School
description: Make sure to bring your own net.

name: Washington Academy Gardner Gym
description: Washington Academy Gardner Gym is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in East Machias, ME. There are 2 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. Players have access to restrooms and water. You can’t reserve the courts.
open_play_schedule: Sessions are managed via TeamReach app, group code WApickleball25.
fees: Private — No fee. Donations accepted to cover material costs (ex. balls, loaner paddles)

name: Woodland High School
description: Come play pickleball at Woodland High School in Baileyville, ME! There are 3 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to lights.
